title: gynampsis
side_effects: Gynampsis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and vomiting, especially when ingested in excess. In some cases, prolonged use of the plant can lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue due to its potential interaction with other medications. Gynampsis may also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and swelling in sensitive individuals. Improper use of the plant can also result in more severe side effects, including respiratory problems, cardiovascular issues, and even liver damage.
